title: Twilit open-questions memory system implemented
body: Twilit Orbiting Galaxy / codex / GPT-5 / 019e5d closed claim 6a7cfd29. Landed the owner-directed open-questions memory system: contracted .agent/memory/operational/open-questions.md, workflow capture/drain in session-handoff and consolidate-docs, manifest registration, and practice-substrate evaluator with tests. Focused tests/type-check/lint/markdownlint/prettier/fitness passed. pnpm practice:substrate:check is still red on a pre-existing abandoned commit_queue[19].files[0] empty-string schema defect; no open-questions findings.
